steps.lede: Your transformation starts now. Not tomorrow.
steps.step1_desc: 2 minutes. Goals, measurements, dietary preferences, fitness level.
steps.step2_desc: AI learns what you eat and adapts all your nutrition plans.
steps.step3_desc: PPL 6 days + personalized nutrition. Log your meals and workouts.
steps.step4_desc: Progress charts, personal records, before/after photos.

nutrition.lede: 7-day plans generated by certified experts, adapted to your exact macros. Scan your fridge, we create your plan.
nutrition.feature1_desc: Generated by certified experts, adapted to your exact macros
nutrition.feature3_desc: Database specific to the Swiss market
nutrition.feature4_desc: Complete selection of balanced fitness recipes

training.lede: Push / Pull / Legs over 6 days, HIIT & LISS cardio integrated. 163 video-guided exercises by certified experts.
training.image_alt: Mountain runner at sunset — MoovX cardio training

tracking.lede: Visualize your progression, celebrate every record, keep the pace. Your data 100% hosted in Switzerland, encrypted.

tracking.feature3_desc: Track your PRs on every exercise, celebrate every milestone
tracking.feature4_desc: Maintain your rhythm, never break the chain

tracking.feature6_desc: Your data hosted in Switzerland, end-to-end encrypted

testimonials.card1_quote: In 6 months, I gained 7 kg of lean muscle. The PPL program and Athena's nutrition advice changed everything. I've never been so consistent.
testimonials.card2_quote: The fitness recipes are incredible. Adapted to my macros, with the ingredients I already have. I've never been so consistent in my diet.
testimonials.card3_quote: At 41, I thought it was too late. My coach Alexandre adapted everything to my family life. Today I run 10K non-stop.

pwa.lede: No App Store needed. Direct install from your browser, like a real native app.

pricing.lede: No surprises. No hidden fees. You know exactly what you pay.
pricing.coach_subtitle: Set your own rate. Your clients pay directly via Stripe.

faq.a1: MoovX is a complete Swiss platform combining personalized training, adapted nutrition, AI coach Athena 24/7, and human follow-up by certified coaches. Designed and hosted in Geneva.
faq.a2: Scan your fridge or food barcodes. Athena analyzes your ingredients, history, and macros to generate personalized recipes in real time. 500+ adaptable recipes.
faq.q3: How does the barcode scanner work?
faq.a3: Open camera, aim at the barcode. In less than a second, the app recognizes the product (2.5M references), displays macros and micronutrients.
faq.a4: PPL = Push / Pull / Legs. Proven 6-day method: 2 Push, 2 Pull, 2 Legs. 163 video-guided exercises, adaptable.
faq.a5: Yes. Data hosted in Switzerland, nLPD compliant, AES-256 encrypted. No reselling. Export and delete available anytime.
faq.a6: 14-day 100% free trial, no credit card, no commitment. Access to all features.
faq.cta_card_detail: Our team responds in under 2h on weekdays.

geneva.lede: MoovX is designed and hosted in Geneva. A Swiss platform, built for the most demanding standards: radical privacy, quality in every pixel, support in 3 languages.
geneva.value3_desc: FR · DE · EN — IT coming soon

cta.lede_part1: Personalized program, AI coach Athena 24/7, human follow-up by certified experts.
cta.image_alt: MoovX athlete shouting in victory after accomplished transformation
